questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have code management software capability to manage publishing, versioning and deleting code?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code management software supports publishing, versioning, and deleting code.
questions.evaluation_focus: Code management software for publishing, versioning, and deleting code

questions.prompt: Is the code management software used for all applications or only for specific ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code management software is used for all applications or only specific ones.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide or scoped application coverage

questions.prompt: Does the software have capability to automatically manage code as and when users make changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the software automatically manages code when users make changes.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated code management when users make changes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for management of code and its lifecycle?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized documented process governs code and its lifecycle.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented code lifecycle management process

questions.prompt: Is the code management process automated by the supporting software?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the code management process is automated by supporting software.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated code management process

questions.prompt: Are code management processes reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code management processes are reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent code management process review

questions.prompt: Are all enterprise application code stored securely at enterprise repositories?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all enterprise application code is stored securely in enterprise repositories.
questions.evaluation_focus: All enterprise application code in secure repositories

questions.prompt: Are repositories scanned frequently for vulnerable code or malicious code and integrated with vulnerability management systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repositories are scanned frequently and integrated with vulnerability management.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent repository scanning integrated with vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Are all code stored securely in repositories?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all code is stored securely in repositories.
questions.evaluation_focus: All code stored securely in repositories

questions.prompt: Is access to all code repositories limited to specific users based on function?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether access to all code repositories is limited by function.
questions.evaluation_focus: Function-based access limits for all code repositories

questions.prompt: Does CI/CD control access to multiple code repositories and staging locations?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CI/CD controls access to code repositories and staging locations.
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD controls access to repositories and staging locations

questions.prompt: Is access to code repositories reviewed frequently to prevent privilege creep?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code repository access is reviewed frequently to prevent privilege creep.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent repository access review to prevent privilege creep

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a code management process to manage publishing, versioning, updating and deleting code?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a code management process handles publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code.
questions.evaluation_focus: Code management process for publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting

questions.prompt: Is the code management process applicable to all applications or only critical ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the code management process applies to all applications or only critical ones.
questions.evaluation_focus: Process scope for all or critical applications

questions.prompt: Is the code management process automated with CI/CD pipelines?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the code management process is automated with CI/CD pipelines.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated code management with CI/CD pipelines

questions.prompt: Is the code management process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the code management process is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent code update process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a process of provisioning a code testing environment for code that needs to be created and tested?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a process provisions code testing environments for creation and testing.
questions.evaluation_focus: Process to provision code testing environments

questions.prompt: Is the code creation and provisioned testing environment performed for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code creation and testing environment provisioning applies to all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Code creation and testing environment for all applications

questions.prompt: Is the code creation and testing environment provisioning automated as part of CI/CD?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code creation and testing environment provisioning is automated via CI/CD.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated provisioning via CI/CD

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a process of deprovisioning a code testing environment for code that needs to be deleted after testing and movement to production?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a process deprovisions code testing environments after deletion and production movement.
questions.evaluation_focus: Process to deprovision code testing environments after deletion

questions.prompt: Is the code deletion and deprovisioned testing environment performed for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code deletion and deprovisioning applies to all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Code deletion and deprovisioning for all applications

questions.prompt: Is the code deletion and testing environment deprovisioning automated as part of CI/CD?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code deletion and testing environment deprovisioning is automated via CI/CD.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated deprovisioning via CI/CD
